name: orichalcum-pulse
description_fr: Invoque un soleil ardent quand le Pokémon entre au combat. L'ancienne pulsation qui anime le Pokémon augmente également sa stat d'Attaque sous un soleil intense.
description_en: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
